title: Toxic Town Takeover
story: A toxic disaster struck Times Beach, Missouri. Dangerous chemicals called dioxins poisoned the whole town. story: A treasure hunt worthy of an action movie unfolded on February 23, 2002. Police in Basel, Switzerland, pulled off a daring sting operation to recover the Sky Disc of Nebra. title: A Painter's Bold Vision
story: Kazimir Malevich burst onto the art scene with revolutionary ideas. Born in Kyiv on February 23, 1878, this Ukrainian painter would change how we see art forever. title: A Cosmonaut's Siberian Roots
story: Vasily Grigoryevich Lazarev blasted off into history on February 23, 1928. Born in the vast wilderness of Siberia, USSR, this future cosmonaut would go on to explore an even greater frontier: space! Lazarev bravely flew on two Soyuz missions, including Soyuz 12 and the daring Soyuz 18A. His journey from the icy plains to the stars inspired many young dreamers.
